diagnosis: The Ubuntu root ext4 filesystem entered emergency_ro after storage I/O errors. Package installation and model runtime work inside this distribution are unsafe until an offline filesystem check completes.

repair_boundary.reason: Microsoft's offline VHD repair workflow requires an already-elevated terminal. This session deliberately does not self-elevate because a prior UAC-triggered operation was reported to have crashed the laptop.

properties: requires explicit confirmation and an already-elevated shell
stops Docker Desktop cleanly only when explicitly authorized
copies and SHA-256 verifies the stopped Ubuntu VHD before repair
identifies exactly one newly attached unmounted ext4 device
uses e2fsck safe automatic repair before any separately authorized aggressive repair
detaches the exact VHD path, hashes and probes before Docker restart, and restarts Docker on both success and recoverable failure paths
does not unregister a distribution, move or replace the VHD, repair Docker's VHD, or change mask authority
